Home / Services / Deck Repair & Restoration

Deck Repair & Restoration

Extending the life of your El Paso deck with expert repairs and restoration services.

Don't let a damaged deck detract from your El Paso home's beauty and value. Red Oaks Pergolas offers comprehensive deck repair and restoration services to keep your deck safe, functional, and looking its best. We understand the unique challenges that the El Paso climate poses to decks, and we have the expertise to address a wide range of issues, from rotting wood to loose railings.

Our deck repair services include replacing damaged boards, repairing or replacing railings, reinforcing support beams, and addressing water damage. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure your deck is structurally sound and aesthetically pleasing. Our restoration services include power washing, staining, and sealing to protect your deck from the elements and enhance its natural beauty.

Whether your deck needs minor repairs or a complete overhaul, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We'll assess the condition of your deck and provide you with a detailed estimate outlining the necessary repairs and restoration work. We pride ourselves on our transparent pricing and commitment to customer satisfaction. Let us help you extend the life of your El Paso deck and enjoy your outdoor space for years to come.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Deck Inspection – We thoroughly inspect your deck to identify any damage or problem areas.
  2. 02 Step 2: Repair Plan – We develop a detailed repair plan and provide you with a transparent estimate.
  3. 03 Step 3: Deck Repairs – Our skilled team performs the necessary repairs using high-quality materials.
  4. 04 Step 4: Deck Restoration – We clean, stain, and seal your deck to protect it from the elements.

Benefits

  • Extends the Life of Your Deck
  • Improves Deck Safety
  • Enhances Deck Appearance
  • Increases Home Value

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if my deck needs repair?

Signs that your deck may need repair include rotting wood, loose railings, wobbly stairs, and sagging support beams. If you notice any of these issues, it's important to have your deck inspected by a professional.

What is the best way to protect my deck from the El Paso sun?

Staining and sealing your deck regularly is the best way to protect it from the El Paso sun. We recommend using a high-quality sealant with UV inhibitors to prevent fading and cracking.

How often should I clean my deck?

We recommend cleaning your deck at least once a year to remove dirt, debris, and mildew. Power washing can be an effective way to clean your deck, but it's important to use the correct pressure to avoid damaging the wood.
